'''Francis''', nicknamed "'''Francis the pink Wookiee'''" for [[Gender/Legends|his]] uniquely decorated [[Armor/Legends|armor]], was a male [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who joined [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]]—an elite fighting unit of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] created by former [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and composed of fringers with Rebel sympathies—during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In his tenure with the Rebellion, he fought at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and flew a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] that was also painted pink.

==Biography==
[[File:Francis_xwing.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Francis with his pink T-65 X-wing starfighter]]
Francis, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]],<ref name="Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron" /> joined [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]—the war between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]—sometime between [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="NA">{{WebCite|url=http://blogs.ign.com/RenegadeSquadron/2007/09/21/66910|text=Francis the Pink Wookiee|work=[http://blogs.ign.com/RenegadeSquadron ''Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron'': The Official Team Blog]|date=2007-09-21|archivedate=20081013004255|nolive=1}}</ref> Renegade Squadron was a recently created Alliance elite fighting unit made up of criminals and [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], which was co-led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Col Serra]], a pair of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]-turned-Rebel officers.<ref name="Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron" />

Francis was given the nickname "Francis the pink Wookiee" due to the fact that his [[Armor/Legends|armor]] was painted [[Color/Legends|pink]]. While a member of Renegade Squadron, in which he engaged in battles both in and out of a [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]], he flew a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] and fought in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="NA" /> After the battle and the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] aboard the [[Death Star II/Legends|second]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]], Renegade Squadron was disbanded by its members so that they could return to their underworld lives.<ref name="Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron" />

==Equipment==
During his tenure with Renegade Squadron, Francis used a [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44 heavy blaster pistol]] in [[Lightfight|firefights]]. He also flew a T-65 X-wing [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]—which was also painted pink—in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Starfighter combat/Legends|battles]].<ref name="NA" /> Francis wore a pink [[Eye patch/Legends|eye patch]] of his right [[Eye/Legends|eye]], similar to that of fellow Wookiee bounty hunter, [[Snoova]].<ref name="Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Viva la Francis!|Jeff Pena, talking about Francis|<ref name="NA" />}}
In the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'', it is possible to play as Francis through the game's character personalization feature. Francis was created by [[Jeff Pena]], the producer of ''Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron''. He was one of Pena's favorite customizable characters in the game, and was so popular with the development team that he was incorporated in ''Renegade Squadron''{{'s}} press demo and [[Wikipedia:Electronic Entertainment Expo|Electronic Entertainment Expo]] presentation.<ref name="NA" />
